about.en: WhiteBIT Coin is the native utility asset of the WhiteBIT exchange ecosystem. WBT is associated with exchange benefits, ecosystem programs, and services around the WhiteBIT platform. It is a centralized-exchange token used by traders and platform participants.
about.es: WhiteBIT Coin es el activo de utilidad nativo del ecosistema del exchange WhiteBIT. WBT esta asociado a beneficios del exchange, programas del ecosistema y servicios alrededor de la plataforma WhiteBIT. Es un token de exchange centralizado usado por traders y participantes de la plataforma.

Es un token d exchange centralitzat utilitzat per traders i participants de la plataforma.
